title: American Express Vice Chair Douglas E. Buckminster to Participate in Barclays Global Financial Services Conference
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--American Express Company (NYSE: AXP) Vice Chair Douglas E. Buckminster will participate in the Barclays Global Financial Services Conference on Wednesday, September 13, 2023, at 11:15 a.m. Eastern. Mr. Buckminster will participate in a fireside chat relating to the company's business strategy and financial performance. A live audio webcast of the discussion will be accessible to the general public through the American Express Investor Relations website at http://ir.am.

title: American Express: Great Business But Wrong Timing
text: American Express is a "compounder stock" with a history of generating alpha and has a deep moat. There are some major cyclical headwinds that will likely cause a drawdown in earnings and a buying opportunity lower. American Express is thought of as undervalued when in reality I think it is likely overvalued because it is compared to other credit card companies with very different risks.
